title: Migrate start, stats, stop to Ginkgo
body:
Migrate the start, stats, and stop integration tests to the
Ginkgo style.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM. There's a lot of room for improvement in the tests now that we have a proper programming language to write them in, but there's plenty of time for that after BATS is purged.

:pushpin: Commit ead6b52 has been approved by `mheon`
